accountTipContent: Welcome to the ULearning Exam System. We have registered an ULearning account for you. If you need to take the exam via your mobile device, please download the ULearning APP (if you haven’t done so) and then log in with your ULearning account.
addBlankTip1: Add at least one blank item
addPartQuestionTip: No more than {n} questions per section.
addPartTip: Add up to {n} sections per exam.
agreenExamNotes: I have read and agree to the items in the exam instructions
allowExchange: Answers can be in an interchangeable order
analysisImgTip: Please wait while the title is identified...
answerCanChangeTip: The answers for the blanks do not need to be in order.
answerTip: The answers for the blanks do not need to be in order
appCreateQueMsg: The mobile version currently does not support creating questions of other types; please create them from the computer.
bankNameError1: The folder name cannot be empty.
bankNameError2: The folder name cannot exceed 200 characters.
bankNameError3: The folder name cannot contain the following characters: <> *?:" '|/\~.'"
bankNameError4: Folders can be added up to 5 levels, the current directory is level {l}, no subfolders can be added to this folder.
bindDownload: Download Moodle Question Bank Conversion Tool
cameraErrorTip: Camera monitoring error - The camera fails to start. Please check whether: {br}1. Camera access is not enabled. {br}2. The camera is used by another program. {br}3. The network is unavailable. {br}If any of the above exists, please fix it and then click the Continue to Answer button.
cameraMonitorDesc: After the camera monitoring is turned on, the system will detect and record your suspicious behaviors such as leaving seat, deviated eye focus, talking with others, etc. Please make sure:  {br}1. Adjust the camera as needed so that your head/face fully appear in the camera view when you are sitting in front of the exam device to take the exam. {br}2. During the exam, focus your eyes on the exam screen, do not leave the seat, and do not talk with others.
cameraMonitorTip: {cameraMonitor} is on - Keep the front-facing camera on all the time through the exam!
changeScoreText: Are you sure to modify points in bulk?
changeTabMsg: The edited content will not be saved after switching the question type. Sure about switching?
choiceMsg: Click on the option to set it as the correct answer
choiceRemarkPaper: Please select the exam paper you want to review
choiceTeacherError1: Please select the teacher you want to share
choiceTeacherError2: Please select the teacher you want to share
choiceTip: Click on the option to set it as the correct answer
codeInvalid1: The verification code has expired, please get it again
codeUploadTip2: Upload up to {num} files at a time.
codeUploadTip4: Upload up to {n} attachments per question.
codeUploadTip5: The file is being uploaded, please wait until the upload is complete before submitting.
commitExamTip1: Switched away from the exam screen more times than allowed and the exam was submitted involuntarily.
commitExamTip2: Switched away from the exam screen for longer than the time allowed and the exam was submitted involuntarily.
commitExamTip4: Time exhausted, exam submitted by the system automatically.
commitExamTip5: Exam submitted involuntarily by the teacher.
commitExamTip6: Screenshot of the violation, forced submission by the system.
commitExamTip7: Time exhausted, exam submitted by the system automatically.
commitExamTip9: The screen monitoring anomaly has reached the threshold. The system will force an exam submission.
completeRemarkTip: Congratulations! All students in your class have been graded
completeRemarkTip1: Congratulations, all students in your class have been graded!
completeRemarkTip2: All students in the current list have been graded! If you need to continue grading, please exit and re-filter the students.
completionAnswerTips: Note: The answers for the blanks do not need to be in order.
confirmCancelEdit: Are you sure to cancel the modification?
confirmClearException: Please carefully review the system screenshot for any violations before clearing the anomaly. Are you sure you want to clear it?
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete it?
confirmDeleteQuestion: Are you sure you want to delete this question?
confirmDeleteSelected: Are you sure to delete the selected {n} items in bulk?
confirmDeleteSelectedTip: The selected items contain exams created by others and cannot be deleted in bulk.
confirmDeleteSelectedTip1: The selected item contains exams that have already been used and cannot be deleted in bulk.
confirmDeleteSelectedTip2: The selected items contain abnormal exams and cannot be deleted.
confirmExit: Are you sure you want to exit?
confirmPaperTip: Are you sure you want to submit?
confirmPaperTip1: Question {n} is not yet answered. Do you still want to submit the exam?
cutScreenMonitorTip1: {cutScreenMonitor} is on - The exam will be submitted involuntarily if the students switch from the exam screen to another screen/App for more than {s} seconds in a single switch or for more than {times} times!
cutScreenMonitorTip2: {cutScreenMonitor} is on - The exam will be submitted involuntarily if the students switch from the exam screen to another screen/App for more than {times} times!
cutScreenMonitorTip3: {cutScreenMonitor} is on - The exam will be submitted involuntarily if the students switch from the exam screen to another screen/App for more than {s} seconds in a single switch!
deleQueNote: Are you sure you want to delete the question?
deleteBankMsg: Are you sure you want to empty the question bank?
deleteConfirm1: If you select Delete Folder, but Keep Questions, the questions contained in the folder will be moved to the root directory after deletion.
deleteConfirm2: If you select Delete All, the questions in the folder will be deleted as well.
deleteConfirm4: Are you sure you want to delete the {n} items?
deleteConfirm6: Data cannot be recovered after deletion.
deleteConfirm7: Are you sure you want to delete it? Data cannot be recovered after deletion.
deleteConfirmNew: Are you sure you want to delete {n}?
deleteFolderIntro1: If you select Delete Folder, but Keep Exams, the exams contained in the folder will be moved to the root directory after deletion.
deleteFolderIntro2: If you select Delete All, the exams in the folder will be deleted as well.
deleteFolderIntro3: Keep the exams and delete the folder only
deleteFolderTip:
The folder contains exams created by others and cannot be deleted directly.
To delete please move these exams out of this folder first.
deleteFolderTip1: The folder contains used exams and cannot be deleted.
deleteFolderTip2: The folder contains abnormal exams and cannot be deleted.
deleteLockPwTip: After you remove the security password, all secured exams and folders will be unsecured!
deletePaperTip: The exam paper has already been used and cannot be deleted.
deletePaperTip1: {name} has already been used and cannot be deleted.
deletePaperTip2: {name} is not the creator and cannot be deleted.
deletePartTip: Deleting a section will delete all questions in that section. Newly created section questions won't be saved to the question bank and cannot be undone after deletion, so please use caution with deletion. Are you sure you want to delete it?
deleteShareFolderTip1: When you delete a shared folder, the subfolders and exams contained in it will be moved back to the personal directory of each creator and will not be deleted synchronously.
deleteShareFolderTip2: Are you sure you want to delete this shared folder?
deleteShareFolderTip3: When you delete a shared folder, the subfolders and questions contained in it will be moved back to the personal directory of each creator and will not be deleted synchronously.
deviceAbnormalityTip: The device monitoring is on and you are not allowed to change the device or browser during the exam. Please use the device or browser that entered the exam for the first time to answer the questions.
deviceMonitorTip: {deviceMonitor} is on - Do not switch to another device or browser during the exam!
downloadDesc1: 1. Download and install the format conversion tool (Windows system only).
downloadDesc2: 2. Export the question bank from Moodle into an xml format file. Only the following question types are supported: multiple choice, true/false, short answer, essay.
downloadDesc3: 3. Use the format conversion tool to convert the xml file to Excel format.
downloadDesc4: 4. Use ULearning's bulk import function to upload the Excel file and import the question bank.
downloadTemplateMsg: Download the Excel template, and fill in the questions according to the instructions.
draftTip: Please edit the exam information on your PC
enableUploadTip: When publishing the exam, you can choose whether to allow students to upload attachments
enterCode: Please enter the spare verification code for the exam
enteredExamTip: The system has detected that you have entered the exam from another page, and if you need to re-enter, please close the other page first.
enteredExamTip1: Under special circumstances, you can ask the proctor for a verification code, and use the code to enter the exam.
enteredExamTip2: If you're sure you don't have multiple answer pages open at the same time, or if you've closed other pages and you're still prompted, {closeBrowser} and then re-enter the exam.
enteredExamTip3: Under special circumstances, you can ask the proctor for a verification code, and use the code to enter the exam.
examCodeTip: Ask your teacher or proctor for the verification code and enter the code below.
examNotStart: The exam is not started yet
examRoomPlaceholder: Please enter exam venue name to search
examUploadTipNew: When selecting a file, the page will temporarily exit the full screen, please complete selecting attachments within 60 seconds and return to the exam interface, and then click any blank space on the page to return to full screen, otherwise the system will record the operation as leaving the exam.
examViewTip: Please view and grade from your computer.
exitShareTip: Once you exit, you will no longer be able to view and use the exams in this shared folder.
exitShareTip1: Are you sure you want to exit?
exitTip: The exam has not been saved.  If you exit now, the new questions created here will be lost. Are you sure you want to exit?
exitTip1: Question {n} is not saved. If you exit now, the editing won't be saved. Are you sure you want to exit?
exitUploadTip: File not submitted, are you sure to leave?
expireTip: Login timed out, please log in again!
faceMonitorTip: {faceMonitor} is on - Need to pass face verification to start the exam!
faceSuccess: Your face identity is verified and the exam will start in 3 seconds.
faceVerificationDesc: Please face the camera and make sure there is enough light. Can't perform face verification?
faceVerificationTip: You have not completed the face verification and cannot take the exam via face verification.
fileLoading: The file is still uploading, please wait.
forceSubmitTip: The teacher terminates the exam in advance, it will be submitted automatically after {seconds} seconds, please do not leave or close the page.
forceSubmitTip1: The student is answering questions. Using this feature, the student will be forced to submit early. There may be a delay of about 10 seconds to 1 minute. This operation cannot be undone, so please use it with caution.
forceSubmitTip3: Are you sure to terminate early?
freezeTip: The system has detected that this account has cheating/improper behaviors in {names} . The account is locked. Please contact your teacher or platform admin.
goBackMsg: The question has not been saved, are you sure you want to return?
guide1: Welcome to the new version of the exam system. Let's take a look at the changes.
guide2: On the left , you can add, move and delete exam sections. Click the section name to switch to that section.
guide3: Click here to edit the section name and description.
guide4: In this new version, you can create and edit questions in the exam directly ! Select a question type here to add a new question. Of course, you can also import questions from the question bank.
guide5: New questions created here will not be automatically saved to the question bank. If necessary, you can use the Import from Exam function in the question bank to import the questions from the exam into the question bank.
guide6: Batch setting of points per question and number of plays per audio moved here.
guide7: Click here to preview the exam when editing.
guide8: Remember to click Save after all editing.
imgImportTip: 1.Please upload a clear image of the exam paper (supports png, jpg, jpeg, max size 512MB). {br}2.The system will automatically recognize questions in the image (supports single-choice, multiple-choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blank, short answer).{br}3. It recognizes printed text and neat handwriting, and converts mathematical formulas to LaTeX format.{br}4. After recognition, please preview and check the content, where you can make edits and corrections.
imgTypeLimitTip: Incorrect image format. Please re-upload an image in png, jpg, or jpeg format.
imporBanktNone: There are no questions in this folder.
importBankOverNum: The number of questions exceeds the upper limit.
importLoadFirst1: 1. With this function, you can export all the questions in this folder and its subfolders.
importLoadFirst2: 2. At present, it only supports exporting Excel format, and pictures, audio, video and other attachments of the questions can not be exported.
importLoadMsg1: Please be patient as the export time may be long.
importLoadMsg2: If your browser blocks pop-ups, please set it to always allow pop-ups.
importQueSuccessMsg1: Import successfully, and {n} questions are added.
importQueSuccessMsg2: Question bank training only supports objective questions and fill-in-the-blank questions, and unsupported question types are automatically skiped.
importTip: Only question types of [Single Choice], [Multiple Choice], [True/False], and [Fill in the Blank] from the question bank can be added to the classroom questions; custom question types are not supported.
incompleteMessage1: The question title cannot be empty!
incompleteMessage11: The number of correct answers cannot be less than the number of blank items.
incompleteMessage5: The choices can not be empty.
incompleteMessage6: Click to enter the choice or delete the extra choices.
incompleteMessage7: The number of correct answers cannot exceed the number of choices.
incompleteMessage9: There are duplicate choices in the answer.
inputAnaly: Click to enter the answer explanation
inputAnalyTip: The answer explanation cannot exceed  {n} characters
inputAnswerTip2: For multiple correct answers, please use "//" to separate them
inputDeviationTip: The error needs to be between 0-{n}
inputFormulaTip: Click the formula icon on the left to enter the formula
inputFormulaTip1: The formula length needs to be between 1 and {n} characters
inputPartName: Click to enter the section name
inputRangeTip: Please enter a valid value range
inputReferenceAnswer: Click to enter the reference answer
inputScoreTip: Enter a score of {num} (One decimal place is allowed)
insertBlankTip: Hit the Tab key also allows you to insert a blank item
insertPaperTip1: Select up to {n} exams at a time
ipAbnormalityTip: IP monitoring is on. Students are not allowed to switch to another network during the exam (Switching the network may cause the IP address to change).
ipMonitorTip: {ipMonitor} is on - Do not switch to another network during the exam!
ipPermissionsTip: Current IP {ip} does not have access to the exam -  Please use the specified device to take the exam!
isArchiveTip: This shared folder has been locked.
joinExamByCode: Enter the exam by verification code
lateLimitTip: Not allowed to take the exam after {min} minutes from the start of the exam
lateTimeTip: No entry is allowed after {minute} minutes from the start of the exam
lateTip: You are not allowed to take the exam since you have passed the permitted late start time.
leaveLimitTimeTip: You have left for {n} seconds. If you leave for more than {m} seconds, your exam will be submitted involuntarily by the system.
leaveLimitTip: Left the exam {n} times and your exam will be submitted involuntarily by the system
leaveTimesTip: You've left the exam screen {n} times!
lockTip: You do not have a recovery email or mobile no with your account. To secure your exams, you need to have a recovery method with your account first.
ltiTip1: If you need to take the exam via ULearning APP or ULearning Lockdown Browser, you can log in with your U-Test account. Your username is: {loginName}, and the initial password is the same as the username.
ltiTip2: If you need to take the exam via ULearning APP or ULearning Lockdown Browser, you can log in with your U-Test account. Your username is: {loginName}, and the initial password is the same as the username. You can modify your password after loggin in.
ltiTip3: Note: If the lockdown does not log in automatically after startup, you can try to log in by entering the ULearing account. Your user name is {loginName}, and the initial password is consistent with the user name.
moveErrorTip1: The exam or folder does not exist.
moveErrorTip4: The question or folder does not exist.
moveFailMsg1: The folder level cannot exceed 5 levels, and the sum of the levels of the target folder and the current folder exceeds the upper limit and cannot be moved.
moveFailMsg2: A folder with the same name exists in the target folder and cannot be moved.
moveMsg: The selected items contain questions created by others and can only be moved within the current shared folder.
moveTip: The selected items contain exams or folders created by others and can only be moved within the current shared folder.
multipleSessions: This exam contains multiple sessions. Please log in to view the sessions and exam time you can   participate in.
name: Name
networkErrorTip1: The system has temporarily saved your answers locally - Do not leave or close the exam screen. Try to re-submit the exam later.
networkErrorTip2: Network error, the exam cannot be loaded normally. Please check the network and restart the exam after the network is recovered.
networkErrorTip3: Data error, the exam cannot be loaded normally. Please contact customer service.
networkErrorTip4: The system has temporarily saved the answer record locally, try to submit it manually again later.
networkMsg1: The network is unstable, and continuing to answer questions may cause the answer record to be lost.
networkMsg2: If the network cannot be restored temporarily, it is recommended to apply to the teacher to withdraw from the exam first, and reschedule the exam later.
noBank: The question bank does not exist.
noCameraTip: The camera is in use or access to it is denied. Please close the program using camera and/or allow camera access by ULearning.
noCameraTip1: Face verification is turned on for this exam and please use a device with a front-facing camera to take the exam.
noCameraTip2: Camera monitoring is turned on for this exam and please use a device with a front-facing camera to take the exam.
noFaceTip: Face verification is enabled for this exam, and you can start the exam after completing face verification.
noPermissionTip: You are not authorized to take this exam. If you have any questions, please contact the exam organizer.
noRecordingTip: Recording access is off. Enable it in the browser settings.
noSkipping: This exam prohibits skipping questions, please answer in order.
notAllowedSubmitTip: The exam is not allowed to submit within {time} minutes after the exam starts
notExitFullScreenTip: Do not exit full screen during the exam. Otherwise it will be logged as leaving exam and might be treated as cheating.
notExitTip: You're not allowed to exit full screen or leave the exam screen during the exam!
notSupportTip: This exam does not support web participation. Please use the type of exam device specified to take the exam.
numExceededTips: Add up to 200 questions at a time.
openAppTip: If the ULearning APP is not launched successfully, please check whether it is installed. If it is not yet installed, please download and install it first.
openLockScreenError: The Lockdown Browser client is not detected，please check if it is installed correctly. If it is installed but still cannot start, try to uninstall and reinstall the latest version.
openLockScreenMsg: The page will launch the Lockdown Browser.
openLockScreenMsg1: If the lockdown browser is not installed or cannot start normally, please download and install the lockdown browser first.
openLockScreenMsg2: If it is installed, please {clickHere}, and when the webpage pops up dialog box, click the Open ULearning Lockdown Browser button.
optionContentTip1: The choice content cannot be empty
overErrorTimes: You have tried 5 times and the account is locked. Please retry after 3 minutes.
ownSpieltag: Only show the sessions of my classes
paperChoiceQueMsg1: Import up to 200 questions at a time.
paperChoiceQueMsg2: Import up to 200 questions at a time.
paperImportError: When you import questions from a exam to this folder, the folder level will exceed the upper limit. The question bank supports up to 5 levels of folders, please reselect a folder to import.
paperUpdateDesc: The original School Exam Bank and Shared Exam Bank functions have been taken offline, please use the Shared Folder in My Exam Bank to share exams with your team.
paperUsedTip: This exam is in use. Only the question stem, answers, and points can be edited. The exam structure cannot be modified. Don't add/delete questions or sub-questions (for combination questions).
paperUsedTip1: This exam is in use. Only the question stem, answers, and points can be edited. The exam structure cannot be modified. Don't add/delete questions or sub-questions (for combination questions). {br}If the question answers or points is changed, re-grade the exam.
passwordTip: The initial password is the same as your username, you can change your password after login.
playTimesError: Error - The number of plays is incorrect
previewError: The question has been deleted from the bank.
previewTip: Add at least one question to each section to save or preview it.
previewTip1: Question {n} is not saved - please save the question first
pwError1: The password should be 6-16 numbers or letters
qrCodeOver: QR code has expired, please click {refresh}
queBankEmpty: There are no questions in this folder.
queScoreError: The score must be between 1 and 100, with one decimal place allowed
questionDelete: The question has been deleted, please refresh the page and try again.
questionEdit1: 1. The types of questions supported by this function: Multiple Choice, Multiple Response, True/False, Fill in the Blank, Essay Question.
questionEdit2: 2. Only plain text question can be imported. Questions that contain pictures, formulas, videos, and audio are not supported.
questionEdit3: 3. There are two ways to add a question: (1) Click on the question type above to add a new question and edit the question according to the template format. (2) Paste the question text  here , and the system will automatically identify the question type and generate the question.
questionEdit4: 4. After entering the questions, you can check whether the result indentified by the system is accurate in the preview area on the right, including question type, answer and points. Save after confirmation.
questionMoveTip: The selected items contain questions or folders created by others and can only be moved within the current shared folder.
questionPlaceholder2: Enter text materials, and AI will extract key points from them to generate questions.
questionTextDesc1: Please enter question requirements below (Note that the questions are generated by a large AI model and may not guarantee complete accuracy; it is recommended to review them before saving).
questionTextDesc2: Please enter the question requirements below.
questionTextType1: Generate a question based on the description
questionTextType2: Generate questions based on the text
questionTitleTip1: The question can not be empty!
questionUpdateDesc: The original School Question Bank and Shared Queation Bank functions have been taken offline, please use the Shared Folder in My Question Bank to share questions with your team.
readTextTip: English only, no more than {n} words
recording: Recording, click on the ripple to stop
recordingInitFailed: Recording initialization failed, please check the recording permission of your phone
recordingTip: There is another audio recording in progress, please close it first.
remarkBackTip: The grading is not completed. Are you sure to leave?
remarkMsg: Note: If a student has multiple attempts, only the latest one will be displayed here.
remarkPageTip: In the review status, only the ungraded questions are displayed.
remarkQueEmpty: There are no questions require manual grading
remarkScoreTip: Please grade according to the specified range.
remarkTip: Question {n} is not graded, save it now?
remarkTip1: Question {n} has not been graded,  end it now?
removeMemberTip: The removed member will no longer be able to view and use the exam papers in this shared folder.
removeMemberTip1: Are you sure you want to remove {name}?
removeQueMsg: Are you sure you want to remove the selected question?
resultsNotAnnounce: The results of this exam won’t be posted.
resultsNotYetAnnounce: Results have not yet been posted
sameQueinPaper: Similar question exist in the exam
saveErrorTips2: Failed to save some of the quesionts!
saveOutText: You have unsaved question(s) , are you sure you want to quit?
saveTipAboutUpload: File uploading is still in progress - Please save later!
scanCodeUploadDesc: Scan this QR code to upload files to your computer from your mobile device.
scanCodeUploadDesc1: The QR code is valid in {num} minutes. You need to reopen the pop-up window if the QR code is expired.
scanCodeUploadTip: Use a mobile device to scan the code, or modify the browser device type identifier.
scanTip: Please scan the correct QR code.
selectPaperIntro: Select the exam and import the questions from the exam into the current folder.  Selecting up to {n} exams at a time.
setAnswerTip: Set the answer (if there is more than one answer to a blank, separate them with //)
setLockPwTip: After you set up a security password, you can secure the selected exam(s) or exam folder(s). The secured exam(s) or folder(s) can only be viewed or unsecured with this password.
shareBankTip: Here are question banks imported from outside and available to teachers across the school.
shareFolderDesc: Shared folders support team collaboration, you can add shared faculty team members after creation.
shareFolderTip1: The new version of Shared Folders allows teachers to work together as a team to manage examrs or questions in the same folder. Meanwhile, the original exam/question sharing function has been taken offline. For exams or questions that need to be shared, you can create a Shared Folder, set up the sharing team members, and move the exams/questions to the shared folder.
shareTip: Please install the WeChat app first.
signinCodeTip: 1. Please use ULearning APP to scan the code to sign in. {br}2. After signing in, you can only use the same equipment to enter the exam.
signinCodeTip1: 1. Please use ULearning APP to scan the code to sign in. {br}2. After signing in, you can only use the same equipment to enter the exam.
soundRecording1: Recording, click on the ripple to stop
soundRecording3: Remarks, not required item, no more than 200 words
standbyVerificationCodeDesc: This verification code can be used to enter the exam when examinees are unable to enter the exam under special circumstances, including: {br}- exams with device/IP monitoring enabled, where examinees need to change devices or IPs  during the exam. {br1}- exams with face recognition enabled, where examinees cannot pass face verification.
standbyVerificationCodeTip: The verification code is valid within {minute}, please refresh to get it again after it expires.
submissionExam: The exam is submitted involuntarily by the system
submissionExamTip1: You have left the exam {n} times. According to the exam monitoring settings, your exam will be submitted involuntarily by the system.
submissionExamTip2: You have left the exam for more than {n} seconds. According to the exam monitoring settings, your exam will be submitted involuntarily by the system.
submitLimitType: The exam is not allowed to submit within {min} minutes after the exam starts
submitPaperErrorTip: Please do not close the page - The system is submitting your exam!
submitPaperErrorTip1: Network unavailable - Please check your network connection!
submitPaperErrorTip2: Submission failed. Please do not close the page - The system is re-submitting your exam!
submitTimeTip: Can not submit within {minute} minutes from the start of the exam
submitTipAboutUpload: File uploading is still in progress - Please submit it later!
switchPartTipAboutRecording: A recording is still in progress. Switching to another section will stop the recording. Are you sure you want to switch?
tagsMsg: Tags (Up to 30 characters, hit Enter to add, up to 3 tags):
timeOverTip: The time has run out. Your exam will be submitted automatically in 3 seconds.
tokenTip: You are already logged in at another terminal.
trainMsg: Please select questions from the individual/school question bank. Only course administrators can import/remove questions.
trainPageTip: The question bank training only supports the computer side temporarily.
transcodeTip: The file is being transcoded, please try again later.
transcodeTip1: The file is being transcoded, please try again later
unableToCalculateAnswer: Cannot be calculated - check your formula!
uploadAudioFail: Failed to upload the recording - Please check network connection
uploadFailTipNew: File upload or transcoding failed, please try to transcode locally first before uploading.
uploadFileError: Some of the questions contain invalid data, please check and modify before uploading.
uploadFileError3: The file type is not supported
uploadFinishTip: After selecting the attachment, click Continue to return to the exam.
useCodeEnter: Use the verification code to enter the exam
useCodeTip: If you need to change the device/browser under special circumstances, please ask the proctor for the verification code, and {useCode} to enter the exam.
usePermission1: Available only to the management team
viewUploadTypeTip:
Supports common formats such as images, documents, video, and audio.Maximum 10 attachments per question.Maximum 500MB per file on the desktop client.​For unsupported formats, please compress the file(s) before uploading.
Documents:​ pdf, doc, docx, xls, xlsx, ppt, pptx, txt, psd, xmind, dwg
Images:​ png, jpg, gif, jpeg, bmp
Video:​ mp4, avi, wmv, rm, rmvb, mpeg, mpg, mkv, mov, flv
Audio:​ mp3, wav, wma
Archives:​ zip, rar, 7z
Subtitle Files:​ srt
writeBankName: Click to enter the folder name
